title: Bhooloka Rambai
subTitle: Bhuvanendra gets smitten with Rambha when he goes hunting. Later, he gets engaged to Rambha but the evil Nageshwara kidnaps her for his ulterior motives.

title: Songs
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of catchy, popular and entertaining songs by various artists and bands from around the world, is played back-to-back.

subTitle: The host plays a comprehensive compilation of various devotional songs performed and composed by different artists in praise of the Almighty.

title: Margazhi Magathuvam

title: Sinthanai Sei Maname
subTitle: The host offers insightful guidance on achieving self-awareness, emotional balance and overcoming life's challenges, encouraging viewers to reflect on their personal journeys.

title: Nattu Maruthuvam
subTitle: A specialist in Siddha medicine demonstrates the preparation of herbal medicines and describes their properties to treat various ailments.
